raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Santa Clara County Office of Education will receive $5,000,000 to build an integrated data system that will streamline the referral process for student mental health services.",
    "The integrated data system aims to create a more efficient way for mental health providers to coordinate care for students.",
    "The integrated data system will allow for better information sharing among mental health professionals, school coordinators, and community-based organizations.",
    "The Santa Clara County Youth Climate Initiative will empower youth to take leadership roles in addressing climate change.",
    "The Youth Climate Initiative will provide youth in Santa Clara County with knowledge and skills regarding sustainability and environmental issues.",
    "The Youth Climate Initiative will integrate in-school curriculum, workshops, and training programs to build skills among youth for influencing public policy related to sustainability.",
    "The Eastside Education Initiative aims to promote a college and career readiness culture among Eastside students and families.",
    "The Eastside Education Initiative will focus on improving core subject proficiency to increase the number of Latinx graduates who pass A-G coursework.",
    "The Eastside Education Initiative will advocate for equitable funding for East San José schools to achieve per-pupil allocations on par with the highest in Santa Clara County."
  ]
}
```
